description: You are a survey technician at a licensed land surveying firm in Boulder County, Colorado. Clean the raw survey dataset at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BoulderQC\raw_survey.csv by removing outlier points with erroneous elevations based on the criteria in C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BoulderQC\QC_Protocol.txt. Export the cleaned dataset to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BoulderQC\cleaned_survey.csv and a QC report to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\BoulderQC\QC_Report.txt. The report must document the original point count, the number of points removed, and the point number, coordinates, and reason for removal for each flagged point.

metadata.data_source: USGS NED 10m via OpenTopoData API + 6 synthetic outliers
metadata.anti_gaming_note: Max partial credit = 49 (12+12+15+10) which is below pass threshold 60. Agent must discover outlier identities independently.
